title: Angular Portfolio SPA
description: Single Page Application built with Angular to present engineering and software projects through a structured, data-driven UI with focus on readability, layout balance, and user experience.
contributions: Designed and implemented a modular SPA architecture using Angular routing and reusable components
Built a dynamic UI driven by structured data models, enabling scalable project rendering
Implemented reactive data handling using Observables and async pipe
Designed responsive layouts with controlled content width and visual hierarchy for improved readability
Developed reusable UI patterns (project cards, stack display, conditional rendering of icons/badges)
Implemented micro-interactions and hover effects to enhance user experience and visual feedback
Focused on clean UI composition, spacing, and typography to balance technical content with usability
impact: Unified engineering and software experience into a single structured portfolio platform
Improved content clarity and navigation through consistent layout and component design

title: Industrial Motion Control Testing Suite
description: Development of a modular .NET desktop testing suite used in industrial production lines for validation of motion control systems, test automation, and production data management.
contributions: Developed a modular .NET testing suite (WPF/WinForms) for industrial motion control systems
Implemented automated test workflows for production line validation processes
Designed and maintained structured data pipelines using JSON and Excel-based reporting
Built auxiliary applications integrated into the main suite, including a CSV-to-JSON converter to ensure compatibility between legacy and modern test data formats
Developed console-based automation tools to manage version control and deployment checks using Git in production environments
Improved deployment workflow by replacing manual file replacement processes with automated Git-based update mechanisms
Provided technical support, debugging, and feature development in production environments
impact: Enabled execution of 10+ automated tests per day in production environments
Supported validation and release of 100+ industrial products to customers
Reduced software update time by replacing manual deployment process with automated Git-based versioning system
Improved compatibility between legacy and modern test systems through automated data format conversion tools

title: Industrial Production Line Automation
description: Development and optimization of PLC-based automation systems for industrial production lines, including control logic, motion systems, HMI design, and full lifecycle contribution to new production line deployment.
contributions: Developed and maintained PLC control software for industrial production lines using Beckhoff systems
Designed and implemented HMI interfaces for operator interaction, monitoring, and control
Contributed to the full development lifecycle of a new production line, from design to deployment
Designed and implemented the core control algorithm for automated production sequences based on recipe-driven parameters and positional tracking
Implemented synchronization logic for continuous material processing using motion control systems and virtual coupling techniques
Improved motion control reliability by refactoring and stabilizing shared control sequences for servo and stepper motor systems
Worked on legacy system upgrades, simplifying code structure and improving maintainability
Coordinated a small software team and managed version control workflows using Git
Supervised electrical work and ensured correct integration between software and hardware systems
impact: Contributed to the production of 100+ units across 20+ work orders in industrial environment
Enabled automated production of a new product type through implementation of core control logic
Reduced production cycle time by up to 6x (from ~60s to ~10s) through process optimization
Improved system stability and reliability in motion control operations
Supported successful deployment of a new production line from design phase to operation

title: RF Cavities Control Systems (PS & SPS)
description: Design and development of PLC-based control systems for RF acceleration cavities at CERN, including system upgrades for PS and new control architecture for SPS high-power RF infrastructure.
contributions: Designed PLC-based control systems for RF cavities and solid-state power amplifiers (SSPA)
Defined system architecture including I/O mapping, control logic and inter-PLC communication
Developed PLC software for startup sequences, fault handling and event logging
Designed HMI interfaces for system monitoring and operation
Contributed to electrical design including control cabinets and power systems
Collaborated with multidisciplinary teams to define system specifications
impact: Delivered control system upgrade for PS RF cavities (40–80 MHz), currently operational
Contributed to development of SPS 200 MHz RF cavity control system
Supported large-scale RF infrastructure with thousands of amplifier modules
Work presented at ICALEPCS 2019 conference (New York)

title: Robotics & Data Acquisition Systems
description: Development of robotic inspection systems and real-time data acquisition platforms for superconducting magnet testing, combining embedded systems, LabVIEW-based control and database-driven web tools.
contributions: Developed real-time data acquisition and protection systems for superconducting magnet testing using LabVIEW and NI cRIO
Implemented quench protection logic with high-frequency threshold-based monitoring and real-time actuation
Built PHP-based tools for database interaction and experimental data visualization
Calibrated and integrated multiple sensor systems (tactile, laser, barcode) using embedded platforms
Worked on robotic inspection system (TIM) including communication protocol migration to CAN
impact: Enabled continuous acquisition of 30+ sensor channels with real-time processing and storage
Improved safety and reliability of superconducting magnet testing through automated protection systems
Contributed to deployment of robotic inspection systems in CERN accelerator environment
